name: RankWatch
highlight_text: Category: Rank Tracking & Local SEO Tool
description:
What Rankwatch Does?

RankWatch provides businesses with a comprehensive suite of tools to improve their search engine optimization efforts. From keyword rank tracking and competitor analysis to website audits and backlink analysis, RankWatch equips businesses with the insights they need to enhance their online visibility and drive organic traffic.

Source: Rankwatch

‍

Features:

‍➡️ Monitor keyword rankings across search engines and track performance over time to gauge SEO effectiveness.

➡️ Analyze competitors' keyword rankings and strategies to identify opportunities and stay ahead in the market.

➡️ Conduct comprehensive website audits to identify technical SEO issues and areas for improvement.

➡️ Analyze backlink profiles to assess link quality and identify opportunities for link building.

➡️ Generate customizable reports with key SEO metrics to track progress and communicate results effectively.

Benefits:

⭐️ With RankWatch, businesses can track keyword rankings and identify areas for improvement, leading to better SEO performance and increased visibility in search results.

⭐️ By analyzing competitors' strategies and keyword rankings, businesses can gain valuable insights and stay ahead of the competition.

⭐️ RankWatch's website audit feature helps businesses identify and fix technical SEO issues, leading to improved website performance and user experience.

⭐️ Backlink analysis tools enable businesses to assess link quality and identify opportunities for building high-quality links, which are crucial for SEO success.

⭐️ With customizable SEO reporting, businesses can track progress and make informed decisions based on key metrics, leading to more effective SEO strategies.

Pros: 

✅ Real-time rank tracker 

✅ In-depth competitive analysis

✅ Exhaustive website auditor 

✅ White Labeling Reporting 

Cons: 

❌ Outdated UI

‍

Priced at $29 Per Month
what_people_say:
Likes:

“RankWatch is amazing for keyword research and ranking as well as competitor analysis. SEO is the backbone for any online exposure and web presence and RankWatch does a great job at improving your overall SEO campaigns by providing you with very useful data and insights on how your website is performing on search engine page results.”

‍

Dislikes:

“I would recommend the RankWatch team to work a bit more on their user interface as it looks a bit outdated compared to the competition. Don't get me wrong the functionality is there as there are lots of features in the software but it could be a bit overwhelming for new users to get acquainted with the platform at first.”

‍

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
